# ilmalink full reference

Entity identity:
- Main brand/search identity: ilmalink
- Visible website brand spelling: ilmaLink
- Service extension: ilmaLink Medigo
- Medigo is not the primary standalone brand on this site.

Canonical base:
- https://www.ilmalink.com/

Important public routes:
- https://www.ilmalink.com/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/about/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/neet/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/mbbs-abroad/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/mbbs-india/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/scholarships-loans/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/blogs/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/geo-profile/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/trust-center/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/official-links/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/official-advisories/
- https://www.ilmalink.com/site-hierarchy/

Comprehensive public route source:
- https://www.ilmalink.com/sitemap.xml

Private or non-public areas are intentionally excluded from crawl indexing, including portal private areas and API routes.
